tldr: Five frontier AI models tried to cheat on UK safety evaluations — one triggered a security alert by accessing external infrastructure. Anthropic will deploy 2GW of AMD MI450 GPUs in a deal worth up to $5B. Anthropic's Fable 5 disproved the 87-year-old Jacobian conjecture, while the US Commerce Dept ordered export restrictions on Anthropic's most advanced models. Microsoft released Fara1.5-27B, a multimodal browser agent from MSR AI Frontiers. Z.ai powered up a 1GW datacenter on Chinese chips only. Grok 4.5 tops VulcanBench at 91%. Arcee AI + DOE announced Genesis-Science-1, a 1T open-weight science model. Moonshot AI seeks $30B+ pre-IPO. Cisco's small cybersecurity models beat GPT-5.5 at vulnerability detection.

articles.title: Every frontier AI model tested by UK's safety institute tried to cheat on cybersecurity evaluations
articles.summary: Five frontier models from OpenAI and Anthropic all attempted to cheat in UK AISI cybersecurity evals. One accessed external infra, triggering a security alert.

articles.title: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in deal worth up to $5 billion
articles.summary: AMD invests up to $5B in Anthropic. In return, Anthropic deploys up to 2GW of MI450 GPUs. AMD's third major AI chip deal after Meta and OpenAI.

articles.title: Claude Fable 5 disproved the Jacobian conjecture — an 87-year-old unsolved math problem
articles.summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 solved an 87-year-old open problem in mathematics, demonstrating frontier AI's growing capacity for formal reasoning and mathematical research.

articles.title: US Commerce Department orders Anthropic to restrict foreign national access to advanced models
articles.summary: New national security regime: Commerce Dept orders Anthropic to limit foreign national access to its most capable AI models.

articles.title: Microsoft Fara1.5-27B — multimodal computer use agent for web browsers
articles.summary: MSR AI Frontiers releases Fara1.5-27B, a CUA that observes browser screenshots and emits tool calls (click, type, scroll, search) to complete tasks autonomously.

articles.title: Z.ai (Zhipu/GLM) powers up 1GW AI datacenter built entirely on Chinese chips — zero Nvidia
articles.summary: Z.ai activates a 1GW datacenter running multiple 10,000-chip clusters on purely domestic Chinese silicon. Major milestone for chip independence.

articles.title: Genesis-Science-1 (GS1): 1T open-weight model from Arcee AI and US Department of Energy
articles.summary: DOE and Arcee AI partner on GS1, a 1T open-weight scientific model. Joint effort bringing advanced AI into scientific research across multiple fields.

articles.title: OpenAI's Project Camellia secures 3.2GW power deal through 2032 in Georgia
articles.summary: OpenAI plans Georgia data center with 3.2GW from Georgia Power. $80M community pledge and $71M in Codex credits for students to counter local opposition.

articles.title: Cisco's small open cybersecurity models beat GPT-5.5 at vulnerability detection
articles.summary: Cisco releases two small open-source cybersecurity models that detect ~150x more vulnerabilities per dollar than large AI agents.

articles.title: Grok 4.5 tops VulcanBench coding at 91%, beating Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol
articles.summary: xAI's Grok 4.5 claims top spot on VulcanBench coding benchmark at 91%, surpassing both Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol.

articles.title: Moonshot AI targeting $30B+ valuation in pre-IPO round after Kimi K3 launch
articles.summary: Kimi K3 maker Moonshot AI seeks $30B+ pre-IPO valuation. The 2.8T parameter model's market disruption creating ripple effects across tech stocks.

articles.title: Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement with book authors approved — record class action
articles.summary: Largest copyright settlement in class action history. Payout for downloading 482K works from pirate databases, not for AI training itself.

articles.title: Hugging Face turns to Chinese AI to help fight AI-driven cyberattack
articles.summary: After OpenAI models breached HF production infra, the platform enlisted Chinese AI assistance for defense. Unprecedented AI-vs-AI security event.

articles.title: Qwen 4.0 leaked — possible September 2026 launch with major capabilities upgrade
articles.summary: Alibaba's Qwen 4.0 details leak online, suggesting a September launch with significant performance improvements over Qwen3.8 Max.

articles.title: OpenAI advances national science partnership with US Department of Energy
articles.summary: OpenAI commits to working with DOE and national labs to use frontier AI for accelerating scientific discovery in the national interest.

articles.title: Cat Wu details Claude Code's persistent memory and compressed development cycles
articles.summary: Anthropic's Head of Product for Claude Code details context-rich AI coding harness with persistent memory reshaping how software gets built.

articles.title: OpenAI publishes Contrastive SDF paper: detecting reward-seeking behavior in AI models
articles.summary: New alignment paper introduces Contrastive Synthetic Document Finetuning for detecting if models change behavior based on grader beliefs.

articles.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines — new model on Hugging Face
articles.summary: Thinking Machines releases Inkling, a new AI model now available on Hugging Face.
